assignments.name: Assign_Deal_And_Team_To_Change_List
assignments.label: Assign Deal And Team To Change List

assignments.label: Clear Selected Rows From Removal Datatables

assignments.name: Reset_Team_Type_Selection_Replacee_Branch
assignments.label: Reset Team Type Selection - Replacee Branch

collectionProcessors.name: Filter_Deal_Teams_To_Selected_Roles
collectionProcessors.label: Filter Deal Teams To Selected Roles

decisions.label: Keep Or Remove Country From Update Collection

decisions.name: Return_To_Previous_Screen_OR_Remove_Teams
decisions.label: Return To Previous Screen OR Remove Teams?

decisions.name: Was_Add_Country_Add_Airline_Add_Deal_Selected
decisions.label: Was Add Country, Add Airline, Add Deal Selected?

formulas.name: f_AirlineTeamDisplayOrBlank
formulas.expression:
IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Id})), "Record Owner: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.leaseworks__Owner_Full_Name__c} & "
" & "Compliance: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Compliance__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Compliance__r.LastName} & "
" & "Contracts: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Contracts__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Contracts__r.LastName} & "
" & "Credit: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Credit__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Credit__r.LastName} & "
" & "Debt: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Debt__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Debt__r.LastName} & "
" & "Investment & Strategy: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Investment_Strategy__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Investment_Strategy__r.LastName} & "
" & "Legal: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Legal__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Legal__r.LastName} & "
" & "Marketing: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Marketing__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Marketing__r.LastName} & "
" & "MR Claims: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.MR_Claims__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.MR_Claims__r.LastName} & "
" & "Portfolio Management: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Portfolio_Fund_Management__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Portfolio_Fund_Management__r.LastName} & "
" & "Powerplant: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Powerplant__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Powerplant__r.LastName} & "
" & "Lease Management: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Receivables__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Receivables__r.LastName} & "
" & "Tax: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Tax__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Tax__r.LastName} & "
" & "Technical: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Technical__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Technical__r.LastName} & "
" & "Trading: " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Trading__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayAirlines.firstSelectedRow.Trading__r.LastName}, Null )

formulas.name: f_CountryTeamDisplayOrBlank
formulas.expression:
IF( NOT(ISBLANK({!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.Id})), "Record Owner: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Owner_Name__c} & "
" & "Compliance: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Compliance__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Compliance__r.LastName} & "
" & "Contracts: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Contracts__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Contracts__r.LastName} & "
" & "Credit: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Credit__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Credit__r.LastName} & "
" & "Debt: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Debt__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Debt__r.LastName} & "
" & "Investment & Strategy: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Investment_Strategy__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Investment_Strategy__r.LastName} & "
" & "Legal: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Legal__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Legal__r.LastName} & "
" & "Marketing: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Marketing__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Marketing__r.LastName} & "
" & "MR Claims: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_MR_Claims__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_MR_Claims__r.LastName} & "
" & "Portfolio Management: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Portfolio_Management__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Portfolio_Management__r.LastName} & "
" & "Powerplant: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Powerplant__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Powerplant__r.LastName} & "
" & "Lease Management: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Receivables__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Receivables__r.LastName} & "
" & "Tax: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Tax__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Tax__r.LastName} & "
" & "Technical: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Technical__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Technical__r.LastName} & "
" & "Trading: " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Trading__r.FirstName} & " " & {!sdt_DisplayCountries.firstSelectedRow.pro_Trading__r.LastName}, Null )

formulas.name: f_QueryAirlines
formulas.expression:
IF( ISBLANK({!Search_Airline}),
"SELECT Id, Name, OwnerId, leaseworks__Owner_Full_Name__c, Accounting__c, Accounting__r.FirstName, Accounting__r.LastName, Compliance__c, Compliance__r.FirstName, Compliance__r.LastName, Contracts__c, Contracts__r.FirstName, Contracts__r.LastName, Credit__c, Credit__r.FirstName, Credit__r.LastName, Debt__c, Debt__r.FirstName, Debt__r.LastName, Investment_Strategy__c, Investment_Strategy__r.FirstName, Investment_Strategy__r.LastName, Legal__c, Legal__r.FirstName, Legal__r.LastName, MR_Claims__c, MR_Claims__r.FirstName, MR_Claims__r.LastName, Marketing__c, Marketing__r.FirstName, Marketing__r.LastName, Portfolio_Fund_Management__c, Portfolio_Fund_Management__r.FirstName, Portfolio_Fund_Management__r.LastName, Powerplant__c, Powerplant__r.FirstName, Powerplant__r.LastName, Pricing__c, Pricing__r.FirstName, Pricing__r.LastName, Receivables__c, Receivables__r.FirstName, Receivables__r.LastName, Tax__c, Tax__r.FirstName, Tax__r.LastName, Technical__c, Technical__r.FirstName, Technical__r.LastName, Trading__c, Trading__r.FirstName, Trading__r.LastName FROM Account WHERE Type = 'Operator' LIMIT 10",
"SELECT Id, Name, OwnerId, leaseworks__Owner_Full_Name__c, Accounting__c, Accounting__r.FirstName, Accounting__r.LastName, Compliance__c, Compliance__r.FirstName, Compliance__r.LastName, Contracts__c, Contracts__r.FirstName, Contracts__r.LastName, Credit__c, Credit__r.FirstName, Credit__r.LastName, Debt__c, Debt__r.FirstName, Debt__r.LastName, Investment_Strategy__c, Investment_Strategy__r.FirstName, Investment_Strategy__r.LastName, Legal__c, Legal__r.FirstName, Legal__r.LastName, MR_Claims__c, MR_Claims__r.FirstName, MR_Claims__r.LastName, Marketing__c, Marketing__r.FirstName, Marketing__r.LastName, Portfolio_Fund_Management__c, Portfolio_Fund_Management__r.FirstName, Portfolio_Fund_Management__r.LastName, Powerplant__c, Powerplant__r.FirstName, Powerplant__r.LastName, Pricing__c, Pricing__r.FirstName, Pricing__r.LastName, Receivables__c, Receivables__r.FirstName, Receivables__r.LastName, Tax__c, Tax__r.FirstName, Tax__r.LastName, Technical__c, Technical__r.FirstName, Technical__r.LastName, Trading__c, Trading__r.FirstName, Trading__r.LastName FROM Account WHERE Type = 'Operator' AND Name LIKE '" & {!Search_Airline} & "%' LIMIT 10" )

formulas.name: f_QueryCountries
formulas.expression:
IF( ISBLANK({!Search_Country}),
"SELECT Id, Name, OwnerId, pro_Owner_Name__c, pro_Accounting__c, pro_Accounting__r.FirstName, pro_Accounting__r.LastName, pro_Compliance__c, pro_Compliance__r.FirstName, pro_Compliance__r.LastName, pro_Contracts__c, pro_Contracts__r.FirstName, pro_Contracts__r.LastName, pro_Credit__c, pro_Credit__r.FirstName, pro_Credit__r.LastName, pro_Debt__c, pro_Debt__r.FirstName, pro_Debt__r.LastName, pro_Investment_Strategy__c, pro_Investment_Strategy__r.FirstName, pro_Investment_Strategy__r.LastName, pro_Legal__c, pro_Legal__r.FirstName, pro_Legal__r.LastName, pro_Marketing__c, pro_Marketing__r.FirstName, pro_Marketing__r.LastName, pro_MR_Claims__c, pro_MR_Claims__r.FirstName, pro_MR_Claims__r.LastName, pro_Portfolio_Management__c, pro_Portfolio_Management__r.FirstName, pro_Portfolio_Management__r.LastName, pro_Powerplant__c, pro_Powerplant__r.FirstName, pro_Powerplant__r.LastName, pro_Pricing__c, pro_Pricing__r.FirstName, pro_Pricing__r.LastName, pro_Receivables__c, pro_Receivables__r.FirstName, pro_Receivables__r.LastName, pro_Tax__c, pro_Tax__r.FirstName, pro_Tax__r.LastName, pro_Technical__c, pro_Technical__r.FirstName, pro_Technical__r.LastName, pro_Trading__c, pro_Trading__r.FirstName, pro_Trading__r.LastName FROM leaseworks__Country__c LIMIT 10",
"SELECT Id, Name, OwnerId, pro_Owner_Name__c, pro_Accounting__c, pro_Accounting__r.FirstName, pro_Accounting__r.LastName, pro_Compliance__c, pro_Compliance__r.FirstName, pro_Compliance__r.LastName, pro_Contracts__c, pro_Contracts__r.FirstName, pro_Contracts__r.LastName, pro_Credit__c, pro_Credit__r.FirstName, pro_Credit__r.LastName, pro_Debt__c, pro_Debt__r.FirstName, pro_Debt__r.LastName, pro_Investment_Strategy__c, pro_Investment_Strategy__r.FirstName, pro_Investment_Strategy__r.LastName, pro_Legal__c, pro_Legal__r.FirstName, pro_Legal__r.LastName, pro_Marketing__c, pro_Marketing__r.FirstName, pro_Marketing__r.LastName, pro_MR_Claims__c, pro_MR_Claims__r.FirstName, pro_MR_Claims__r.LastName, pro_Portfolio_Management__c, pro_Portfolio_Management__r.FirstName, pro_Portfolio_Management__r.LastName, pro_Powerplant__c, pro_Powerplant__r.FirstName, pro_Powerplant__r.LastName, pro_Pricing__c, pro_Pricing__r.FirstName, pro_Pricing__r.LastName, pro_Receivables__c, pro_Receivables__r.FirstName, pro_Receivables__r.LastName, pro_Tax__c, pro_Tax__r.FirstName, pro_Tax__r.LastName, pro_Technical__c, pro_Technical__r.FirstName, pro_Technical__r.LastName, pro_Trading__c, pro_Trading__r.FirstName, pro_Trading__r.LastName FROM leaseworks__Country__c WHERE Name LIKE '" & {!Search_Country} & "%' LIMIT 10" )

formulas.name: f_QueryDeals
formulas.expression: "SELECT Id, Name, Deal_Team_Members_Local__c, pro_Owner_Name__c FROM leaseworks__Marketing_Activity__c WHERE leaseworks__Inactive_MA__c = false" & IF( ISBLANK({!Search_Deal}), "", " AND Name LIKE '%" & {!Search_Deal} & "%'" ) & " LIMIT 10"

recordLookups.name: Get_Deal_Teams_For_Selected_Deal
recordLookups.label: Get Deal Teams For Selected Deal

fields.name: DisplayTeamUpdatesText
fields.fieldText:
Update Configurations


User To Add: {!UserToAdd.recordName}

Roles: {!Choose_Role_s_To_Update}


Teams That Include {!UserToBeReplaced.recordName} In The Roles: {!varRolesToUpdate}

Countries: {!Create_Replacee_Country_Name_List}

Airlines: {!Create_Replacee_Airline_Name_List}

Deals: {!Create_Replacee_Deal_Name_List}

fields.name: RemoveTeamsHeader
fields.fieldText: Teams Selected To Update

fields.name: Copy_1_of_UpdatedTeamsHeader
fields.fieldText:
Updates Successful


User Added: {!UserToAdd.recordName}

User Replaced: {!UserToBeReplaced.recordName}

Roles: {!Choose_Role_s_To_Update}

Countries: {!Create_Replacee_Country_Name_List}

Airlines: {!Create_Replacee_Airline_Name_List}

Deals: {!Create_Replacee_Deal_Name_List}

﻿

fields.name: SelectCountriesHeader
fields.fieldText: Team Selection

fields.name: UpdatedTeamsHeader
fields.fieldText:
Updates Successful


User: {!User.recordId}

Roles: {!Choose_Role_s_To_Update}

Countries: {!Create_Country_Name_Collection}

Airlines: {!Create_Airline_Name_Collection}

Deals: {!Create_Deal_Name_Collection}

﻿

textTemplates.text: View Report In LeaseWorks

textTemplates.name: tt_ViewReportRichText
textTemplates.text: View Report In LeaseWorks
